::: lt-grid

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c1}
LT1
:::
::: lt-title
One-Step Equations
:::
::: lt-desc
Solve one-step equations using inverse operations — addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Inverse operations]{.lt-skill .c1}
[Add & subtract]{.lt-skill .c1}
[Multiply & divide]{.lt-skill .c1}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c2}
LT2
:::
::: lt-title
Two-Step Equations
:::
::: lt-desc
Solve two-step equations including those with brackets and fractions by applying two inverse operations in sequence.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Two inverse steps]{.lt-skill .c2}
[Brackets]{.lt-skill .c2}
[Fractions]{.lt-skill .c2}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c3}
LT3
:::
::: lt-title
Unknowns on Both Sides
:::
::: lt-desc
Solve equations where the unknown appears on both sides by collecting like terms first.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Collect like terms]{.lt-skill .c3}
[Rearrange]{.lt-skill .c3}
[Balance method]{.lt-skill .c3}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c4}
LT4
:::
::: lt-title
Expand and Solve
:::
::: lt-desc
Expand single and double brackets then solve the resulting linear equation.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Single brackets]{.lt-skill .c4}
[Double brackets]{.lt-skill .c4}
[Simplify then solve]{.lt-skill .c4}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c5}
LT5
:::
::: lt-title
Algebraic Fractions
:::
::: lt-desc
Solve equations involving algebraic fractions by clearing denominators or using cross-multiplication.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Clear fractions]{.lt-skill .c5}
[Cross-multiply]{.lt-skill .c5}
[LCD method]{.lt-skill .c5}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c1}
LT6
:::
::: lt-title
Form and Solve from Context
:::
::: lt-desc
Translate word problems into equations and solve them — including number riddles, ages, geometry, and formula problems.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Number problems]{.lt-skill .c1}
[Age problems]{.lt-skill .c1}
[Geometry & formulas]{.lt-skill .c1}
:::
:::

:::
